title: Note inside! — bottle pops open
prompt: Tight close-up on @beach-shore tide line. @Sara already with both hands on the @magic-bottle, the cork POPS out with a soft *thwop* sound. A tiny rolled paper — the @rescue-note — slides out into Sara's open palm. Sara holds it up between her thumb and finger, eyes huge. @Eva already pressed in close beside her, mouth a small 'O' of wonder, both girls leaning in to look. The empty bottle still glows faintly. Sara (whispered awe): "It... it's a NOTE." Eva (nose almost touching the paper): "What does it SAY?" Sara (carefully unrolling the tiny scroll between two fingers): "Hold on, hold on..." The paper unfurls to reveal handwritten lines.
